PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?protectedArea ?name ?area_km2 WHERE {
  ?protectedArea wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q473972 .
  ?protectedArea wdt:P2046 ?amountNode .
  ?amountNode wikibase:quantityAmount ?value .
  ?amountNode wikibase:quantityUnit ?unit .
  BIND(IF(?unit = wd:Q25325 , xsd:decimal(?value) , IF(?unit = wd:Q712224 , xsd:decimal(?value) / 1000000 , 0)) AS ?area_km2)
  FILTER(?area_km2 > 250000)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?protectedArea rdfs:label ?name .
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?area_km2)
LIMIT 10
